meta.title: PageFoundry
meta.description: High-converting landing pages, hosting, SEO, maintenance.

hero.h1: Landing Pages, Hosting, SEO, Speed. Built to convert.
hero.sub: High-performing web presence. Clean infrastructure. No bullshit retainers.

landing_page.title: Landing Page
landing_page.desc: A high-performing, modern, and aesthetic landing page optimized for maximum conversion.

landing_page_hosting.title: Landing Page Hosting
landing_page_hosting.desc: We host your existing landing page. Choose with or without domain management.

all_inclusive.title: All-Inclusive Package
all_inclusive.desc: Landing Page, Domain, Basic SEO & Google Indexing – all included, incl. 12 months of hosting, then €19/month. Domain renewal billed separately.

seo_basic.title: SEO Basic
seo_basic.desc: Technical and content-based optimization for better visibility in search engines.

seo_advanced.title: SEO Advanced
seo_advanced.desc: Advanced SEO analysis, keyword strategy & long-term performance optimization.

speed_opt.title: Speed Optimization
speed_opt.desc: Boost your website speed for optimal user experience and top Google rankings.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Subscription
maintenance.desc: Monthly maintenance, backups, security updates & continuous performance checks.

request_offer.title: Request Offer
request_offer.desc: Custom scope or bundle. Ideal for unique requirements.

free_consultation.title: Free Consultation
free_consultation.desc: Talk to us. Get clarity on strategy, timelines, and budget.

consultation.title: Free Consultation
consultation.subtitle: Book a free Zoom call.

consultation.notesPlaceholder: Brief description of your project or questions…
consultation.noSlots: No slots available for this day.

consultation.phoneHint: Prefer to call? Reach us at

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.slot: Please choose an available time slot.

success.title: Request received.
success.next1: You will get a confirmation email with the Zoom link right away.
success.next2: We meet in the Zoom call at your chosen time – camera optional.
success.next3: After the call you get a clear recommendation, with no obligation.

mail.customerText: Thanks for booking a free consultation.
mail.customerAttach: You will also find a calendar invitation attached.

register.title: Register

login.label: Customer portal
login.title: Welcome back.

login.newHere: New to PageFoundry? You do not need an account to get in touch.

reset.forgotSubtitle: Enter the email address for your customer account.
reset.sentText: If a matching account exists, a password reset link has been sent.
reset.resetSubtitle: The link is valid for 30 minutes and can only be used once.
reset.tooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
reset.invalid: The link is invalid or has expired.
reset.successText: All previous sessions have been signed out. You can now log in again.
